# clearpass_services (Data Source)

Retrieve a list of ClearPass Services.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Retrieve all services, calculating the total count
data "clearpass_services" "all" {
  calculate_count = true
}

# Retrieve services using a filter (e.g., matching a specific template type)
data "clearpass_services" "filtered" {
  filter = "{\"template\": \"RADIUS Enforcement ( Generic )\"}"
  sort   = "-id"
  limit  = 10
}

output "all_services_count" {
  value = data.clearpass_services.all.services.#
}

output "filtered_services_first_name" {
  value = try(data.clearpass_services.filtered.services[0].name, "none")
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `calculate_count` (Boolean) Whether to calculate the total item count.
- `filter` (String) JSON filter expression specifying the items to return.
- `limit` (Number) Maximum number of items to return (1 - 1000).
- `offset` (Number) Zero based offset to start from.
- `sort` (String) Sort ordering for returned items (default +id).

### Read-Only

- `services` (Attributes List) List of services matching the query parameters. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--services))

<a id="nestedatt--services"></a>
### Nested Schema for `services`

Read-Only:

- `acct_proxy_enabled` (Boolean) Enable Accounting Proxy Targets.
- `acct_proxy_targets` (List of String) List Accounting Proxy Target names.
- `action_after_audit` (String) Action after audit (NONE, SNMP, RADIUS).
- `audit_coa_action` (String) RADIUS CoA Action to be triggered after audit.
- `audit_enabled` (Boolean) Enable Audit End-hosts.
- `audit_mac_auth_client_type` (String) Client Type For MAC authentication request Audit Trigger Condition (KNOWN, UNKNOWN, BOTH).
- `audit_server` (String) Audit Server Name.
- `audit_trigger_condition` (String) Audit Trigger Conditions (ALWAYS, NO_POSTURE, MAC_AUTH).
- `auth_methods` (List of String) A list of authentication methods allowed for this service.
- `auth_sources` (List of String) A list of authentication sources used to verify user credentials.
- `authz_sources` (List of String) List of Additional authorization sources.
- `default_posture_token` (String) Default Posture Token.
- `description` (String) Description of the service.
- `enabled` (Boolean) Whether the service is enabled.
- `enforcement_policy` (String) The name of the enforcement policy associated with this service.
- `id` (Number) Numeric ID of the service.
- `match_type` (String) Specifies whether to match ALL or ANY of the service rules.
- `monitor_mode` (Boolean) Enable to monitor network access without enforcement.
- `name` (String) Name of the service.
- `posture_enabled` (Boolean) Enable Posture Compliance.
- `posture_policies` (List of String) List of Posture Policies.
- `profiler_coa_action` (String) RADIUS CoA Action to be triggered by Profiler.
- `profiler_enabled` (Boolean) Enable Profile Endpoints.
- `profiler_endpoint_classification` (List of String) List of Endpoint classification(s) after which an action must be triggered.
- `radius_proxy_enable_for_acct` (Boolean) Enable proxy for accounting requests (Applicable only for RADIUS Proxy Service Type).
- `radius_proxy_scheme` (String) Proxying Scheme for RADIUS Proxy Service Type (Load Balance, Failover).
- `radius_proxy_targets` (List of String) List of Proxy Targets for RADIUS Proxy Service Type.
- `remediate_end_hosts` (Boolean) Enable auto-remediation of non-compliant end-hosts.
- `remediation_url` (String) Remediation URL.
- `role_mapping_policy` (String) The name of the role mapping policy associated with this service.
- `service_cert_cn` (String) Subject DN of Service Certificate.
- `service_rule` (Attributes List) A list of rules used to classify requests into this service. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--services--service_rule))
- `strip_username` (Boolean) Strip Username
- `strip_username_csv` (String) Strip Username Rule (comma-separated).
- `template` (String) Template of the service.
- `type` (String) The type of service.
- `use_cached_policy_results` (Boolean) Enable to use cached Roles and Posture attributes from previous sessions.

<a id="nestedatt--services--service_rule"></a>
### Nested Schema for `services.service_rule`

Read-Only:

- `name` (String) The name of the attribute to check.
- `operator` (String) The operator used for comparison.
- `type` (String) The type of attribute to check.
- `value` (String) The value to compare against.
